title: Configure a Pod to Use a Projected Volume for Storage — Clean up
text:
Delete the Pod and the Secrets:
kubectl delete pod test-projected-volume
kubectl delete secret user pass

Learn more about
projected
volumes.
Read the
all-in-one volume
design document.
